name: Change proposal
about: Propose a change to the standard, schema, linting, profile system, or interop direction

## Problem
What needs to change?

## Proposed direction
Describe the proposal briefly.

- [ ] core standard
- [ ] schema

- [ ] profile

## Notes
Add examples, rationale, or references here.
